debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ ⊥ ∉ @decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R

proof:
intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ (by simpa [hD'] using hD')
failed_attempts:
intro h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₂
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ := h₁ D hD
  simp_all

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ @decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D : Set α) := h₁
  have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α) (hD : D ∈ R), ⊥ ∈ D := by
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp h₂
    exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    have h₅ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := by
      intro D hD
      have h₆ : ∀ D ∈ R.carrier, ⊥ ∉ D := by
        intro D hD
        have h₇ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
          simp_all [refinement.bot_not_mem]
        exact h₇
      simpa using h₆ D hD
    exact h₅ D hD
  exact h₄ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₃ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := h₃ D hD
  exact h₄ h₂

intro h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

rw [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₃ h₂

intro h
  rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp h with ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  obtain ⟨D, hD_in, hD_mem⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp (by simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h)
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD_in
  exact h₂ hD_mem

simp only [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  -- We need to show that ⊥ is not in any D ∈ R
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  -- Since R is a refinement, for every D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro h₂
    have h₃ : ⊥ ∈ D := h₂
    -- By definition of refinement, ⊥ ∉ D for any D ∈ R
    have h₄ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem
    exact h₄ D hD h₃
  -- Contradiction arises as ⊥ cannot be in D if D ∈ R
  exact h₂ hD'

have h₁ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    exact R.bot_not_mem D hD
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := h₁ D hD
  exact h₂ hD'
sorry

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ I := hI'
  have h₃ : ∀ D ∈ R, ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ I := h₂
  have h₅ : I ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := hI
  have h₆ : ⊥ ∉ I := h₃ _ h₅
  exact h₆ h₄

intro h
  -- If ⊥ is in the decomposition, then there exists some D in R.carrier such that ⊥ ∈ D.
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h ⊢
    exact ⟨Classical.choose h, Classical.choose_spec h⟩
  -- Obtain such a D.
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  -- Use the property of R that no D in R.carrier contains ⊥.
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D (by simpa [SetLike.mem_coe] using hD)
  -- Contradiction arises as ⊥ is in D.
  exact h₂ hD'

simp only [decomposition_of_refinement]
  intro h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := hI
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ I := hI'
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I h₁
  exact h₃ h₂

intro h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
  have := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  exact this hI'

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, a, ha, hab⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.2.1 D hD
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ D := by
    rw [hab] at ha
    exact ha
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.2.2 D hD
  exact h₃ h₂

have h_main : ⊥ ∉ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    intro h
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
    obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
    have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem I hI
    exact h₁ (by simpa using hI')
  exact h_main

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ ⋃ D ∈ (refinement.carrier R), D := by
    simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : D ∈ (refinement.carrier R) := hD
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D h₃
  exact h₅ h₄
successful_attempts:
intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ (by simpa [hD'] using hD')

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₁ hD'

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simp_all [Set.mem_iUnion]
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      have h₄ : D ∈ R := hD
      have h₅ : ∀ (D : Set α), D ∈ R → ⊥ ∉ D := by
        intro D hD
        exact R.bot_not_mem D hD
      exact h₅ D h₄
    exact h₃
  exact h₂ h₁

have h : ∀ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) → ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    have := R.bot_not_mem D hD
    tauto
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    intro h₂
    have h₃ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
      simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₂
      obtain ⟨D, hD, h₄⟩ := h₂
      exact ⟨D, hD, h₄⟩
    obtain ⟨D, hD, h₄⟩ := h₃
    have h₅ : ⊥ ∉ D := h D hD
    contradiction
  exact h₁

intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
    exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at h ⊢
    exact h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'

intro h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  exact h₁ (by aesop)

have h_main : ∀ (D : Set α), D ∈ R → ⊥ ∉ D := by
    intro D hD
    have h₁ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
      by_contra h₂
      have h₃ : ⊥ ∈ D := h₂
      have h₄ : ∀ (D : Set α), D ∈ R → ⊥ ∉ D := by
        intro D hD
        exact R.bot_not_mem D hD
      exact h₄ D hD h₃
    exact h₁
  
  have h_contra : ⊥ ∉ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    intro h
    have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
    have h₂ : decomposition_of_refinement R = ⋃ D ∈ R, D := rfl
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    -- If ⊥ is in the union, then it is in some D in R
    have h₃ : ∃ D : Set α, D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
      classical
      -- Use the fact that ⊥ is in the union to find a D in R containing ⊥
      have h₄ : ⊥ ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := h₁
      -- Extract the D from the union
      obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp h₄
      exact ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩
    -- Obtain the D from the existence statement
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₃
    -- Use the fact that ⊥ is not in any D in R to derive a contradiction
    have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := h_main D hD
    exact h₄ hD'
  
  exact h_contra

intro h
  have h₁ := R.bot_not_mem
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement] at h h₁ ⊢
  have h₂ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simpa using h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∈ D := hD'
  have h₄ : ⊥ ∉ D := h₁ D hD
  contradiction

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h₁
  have h₂ : ⊥ ∈ ⋃ (D : Set α) (hD : D ∈ R), D := h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ : ∃ (D : Set α), D ∈ R ∧ ⊥ ∈ D := by
    simpa using h₂
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ D := by
    have h₄ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), ⊥ ∉ D := R.bot_not_mem
    exact h₄ D hD
  exact h₃ hD'

intro h
  have h₁ : ⊥ ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := h
  simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h₁
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ := R.bot_not_mem D hD
  exact h₂ hD'
